headline: How The Essex Property Trust (ESS) Narrative Is Evolving With An Unchanged Analyst Price Target
summary: Essex Property Trust’s latest analyst update comes with no change in the price target, keeping expectations at the same level as previous reports. With no new commentary from analysts this time, the focus shifts to what this silence might mean for your view on the stock. Read on to see how to track future updates and incorporate this steady price target into your own research process. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Essex Property Trust shifts by adding it to your watchlist or portfolio...

headline: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Essex Property Trust to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $295
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   upgrades Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) from In-Line to Outperform and raises the price target from $269 to $295.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Essex Property Trust, Raises Price Target to $280
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $262 to $280.

headline: A Look At Essex Property Trust (ESS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent performance snapshot Essex Property Trust (ESS) has drawn fresh attention after a recent pullback, with the stock down about 1.4% over the past week and roughly flat over the past year. At a recent close of US$272.64 and a market value near US$18.1b, the West Coast focused apartment REIT shows a mix of modest annual revenue growth and declining net income, which gives investors several angles to assess.
